There are exceptions. 1) If the defender is not the specific target of the spell (as in the cast of an environmental spell or an area spell), protego cannot be used. 2) There are specific spells that do not allow protego to be used (such as Defodio). 3) If the defender is incapacitated, they cannot attempt to case this as a counterspell.
A critical success, regardless of the roll value or the opponent's roll value, always succeeds in blocking an incoming spell.

spells.name: Complex Animation Spell
spells.description: Complex Animation Spell. This spell will animate an object giving it three simple commands and two more complex/abstract commands. The headmaster determines what counts as simple, complex or abstract and the headmaster has final say on the behavior of the transfigured object. The transfiguration will wear off after 12 hours.

spells.name: Complex Self Watering Spell
spells.description: Self waters plants up to every 6 hours. The water source must be nearby.

spells.name: Complex Self-Stirring Spell
spells.description: Allows a potion to be stirred automatically at least once every 6 hours

spells.name: Complex Trace Placement
spells.description: Allows one to place a trace in a broad area (no larger than a country) detecting whether or not any spell is cast in the area meeting a specific criterion. You may add one criterion (logical component; permissible at the discretion of the headmaster). The logical components may be things like the age of the caster, the spell used, the skill used, the skill level used, background, or similar features. Each criterion cannot be specific to the caster such as their birthdate, name, etc.

spells.name: Complicated Animation Spell
spells.description: Complicated Animation Spell. This spell will animate an object giving it three simple commands and two more complex/abstract commands. The headmaster determines what counts as simple, complex or abstract and the headmaster has final say on the behavior of the transfigured object. The transfiguration will wear off after 1 hour.

spells.name: Complicated Trace Placement
spells.description: Allows one to place a trace in a general area (no larger than a few dozen acres) detecting whether or not any spell is cast in the area.

spells.name: Concelio
spells.description: Conceals the magical properties of a magical artifact. Any effort to reveal the magical properties of an artifact will have to better the concelio spell cast result.

spells.name: Confundus
spells.description: Causes the target to become confused. Rolls above 10 cause confusion for five minutes. Rolls above 20 cause confusion for 30 minutes. Rolls above 30 cause confusion for 2 hours. Rolls above 40 cause confusion for a day. Rolls at or above 50 cause permanent confusion.

spells.name: Conjunctivitis Curse
spells.description:
Causes the target's eyes to swell and close with mild pain while it remains in effect. Must be cured. Deals 1L wound of vital damage and blurs the target's vision.
The pus of an infected human's eyes can be extracted.

spells.name: Cornflake Skin
spells.description: Causes the target's skin to appear as though it was coated in cornflakes. This causes embarrassment. The transfiguration will wear off after about 3 hours.

spells.name: Corpusculous Curse
spells.description: Causes the target's body to develop painful boils. These boils cause 2L Wounds per hour until healed.

spells.name: Cracker Jinx
spells.description: This spell is used to conjure exploding wizard crackers; it can be used in dueling to harm the opponent, but the force of the explosion may also affect the caster if the caster is in close proximity. 2 Light wounds (burns) are taken if anyone is injured by this. While it is called a "jinx", this is a misnomer.

spells.name: Cribbing Spell
spells.description: Allows the caster to cheat on a written exam. Must beat the roll of an anti-cheating spell to be successful. If the cheater is successful, they may take +5 to their total score. If they are unsuccessful, they may be caught and receive a letter grade lower and a punishment.

spells.name: Crinus Muto
spells.description: Changes the target's hair color. The transfiguration will usually wear off after about 15 seconds. Most use this simply to capture a photo of themselves with a different hair color.

spells.name: Cruciatus Curse
spells.description: Causes the target incredible pain. The target is incapacitated while under the influence of the spell. This is one of the unforgivable curses. They take 1 Heavy wound of sanity shaking damage.

spells.name: Cure Disease
spells.description: When properly cast, this can cure a disease outright. If the first cast fails to cure the disease (either because the threshold isn't met or because the cast value is lower than to disease set value), then this spell will never cure that disease in that person.
spells.rationale: We need a way to cure diseases outright.

spells.name: Curse Resistance
spells.description: Protects against curses. Any curse cast with an omnibus value under 12 is automatically resisted. Can be cast on an area or as a counterspell. Wears off after one successful resistance.

spells.name: Cushioning Charm
spells.description: Produces an invisible cushion over the target. Typically used to cushion broomsticks, but can also be used to cushion one's fall.

spells.name: Dancing Jinx
spells.description: Forces the target's legs to dance in place. Target cannot move but can cast. Wears off after one battle turn round or 15 seconds.

spells.name: Daydream Charm
spells.description: Gives the target a highly realistic 30 minute daydream. To others, the victim will appear to have a vacant expression and is often seen drooling. If cast on a player in combat, that player is incapacitated.

spells.name: Deflatus
spells.description: Reverses the effect of the inflatus transfiguration.

spells.name: Deflection
spells.description: Forms an invisible barrier in front the tip of the caster's wand. This barrier deflects any hexes or jinxes back at their caster. The barrier will fade once it successfully blocks a hex or jinx.

spells.name: Depulso
spells.description: Causes the target person or object to move magically away from the target. The target will only be pushed back a few feet and won't take any damage.
spells.rationale: This is a precursor to the knockback jinx that is available earlier in the defense line and causes no damage.

spells.name: Descendo
spells.description: Causes object to fall or move downwards at a greater rate.

spells.name: Detergent
spells.description: Cleans dirt off of the target

spells.name: Deterioration
spells.description: Disorients a target. They will suddenly feel lost and will often walk off in a different direction. In battle, this causes them to lose a turn (wears off after one battle turn round or 15 seconds). The caster will usually be unaware of their disorientation (even if they heard the incantation being uttered).

spells.name: Diminuendo
spells.description: Forces the target to shrink to the "very small" size. The target will return to full size at a random time determined by the headmaster.

spells.name: Dimming Spell
spells.description: If there is lighting in a particular area, you dim all of it.

spells.name: Disarming
spells.description: Causes the target to lose grip of their wand if they are holding it. Results of greater than 15 will result in the held object flying back to the caster

spells.name: Disease Reduction Spell
spells.description: A simple but powerful spell that heals 1H wound of disease-related damage. Can only be used once per illness. This spell will not cure the underlying disease if there remains some infection of some kind.

spells.name: Disillusionment
spells.description:
Causes the target to blend seamlessly in with its surroundings like a chameleon. Rolls of 10 - 12 will last for about 1 minute. Rolls of 12-13 will last 2 minutes. Rolls of 14-15 will last 5 minutes. Anything larger will last 10 minutes. The target must remain completely still or the spell will wear off.
Other characters may use perception to attempt to spot the target.

spells.name: Dissendium
spells.description: Opens secret passageways

spells.name: Distilling Spell
spells.description: Allows one to distill dirty water

spells.name: Dolohov's Curse
spells.description: Deals 1 Heavy Wound immediately and 1 Medium wound per day for 10 days. Target must continuously heal these wounds throughout the 10 days to remain alive. There is no known cure for this curse. It must run its course.

spells.name: Draconifors
spells.description: Transforms the target into a dragon

spells.name: Drought Charm
spells.description: Evaporates liquid. Does not work on bodies of water or pools of water. Does not work on the water inside an organism. The liquid will return within seconds on any roll less than 10.

spells.name: Ducklifors
spells.description: Temporarily transforms a small target into a duck. The transfiguration will wear off after about 15 seconds. This duck is non-aggressive.

spells.name: Dumbledor's Force
spells.description: This spell produces a forceful wall of spell energy that spreads out from the caster's wand like a shield and charges forward (spanning out as it progresses). It can be cast as a counterspell for any spells that allow protego to be cast. Any spells incoming at the time of the cast are deflected. Any objects in the way are pushed aside. Anyone in front of the shield is forcefully knocked back and knocked over. The shield will spread about 10 feet out and will have a total width of about 40 feet wide.

spells.name: Ear Shrivelling Curse
spells.description: Causes they targets ears to shrivel up. Temporarily makes the target deaf. This transfiguration lasts for about 30 seconds or 2 battle turn rounds. Perception -2 during this time.

spells.name: Ears to kumquats
spells.description: This spell transforms the target's ears into kumquats. This will last for about 15 seconds (or one battle turn round) and hearing is nearly impossible during this time.

spells.name: Ebublio
spells.description: Conjures large, strong bubbles. If cast at a creature or person, the target can be temporarily suspended inside the bubble. They must cast a spell that would reasonably pop the bubble to get out. The bubble will burst naturally after one battle turn round (about 5 seconds).

spells.name: Egyptian Crypt Writing
spells.description: An ancient Egyptian form of magic involving helping spirits pass on. The incantations are written on the walls of the tomb of the spirit one wishes to banish to the afterlife. Once completed, the spirit will be banished, never to return.

spells.name: Egyptian Inscription: Let the Dead Pass On
spells.description: This is an ancient egyptian practice of writing an inscription on a wall prior to a person dying. Anyone who dies within the room will be prevented from becoming a spirit of any kind.

spells.name: Elite Animation Spell
spells.description: Elite Animation Spell. This spell will animate an object giving it five complex/abstract commands. The headmaster determines what counts as simple, complex or abstract and the headmaster has final say on the behavior of the transfigured object. The transfiguration will wear off after 3 days.

spells.name: Elite Broom Braking Charm
spells.description: Improves a broom's braking capabilities such that the user can maneuver more effectively. +7 to flying checks when specifically maneuvering around corners or stopping in mid-flight.

spells.name: Elite Plant Accelerant
spells.description: Allows one to speed the growth of a plant by 150% on any plant below the level of the cast

spells.name: Elite Plant Decelerant
spells.description: Allows one to slow the growth of a plant by 150% on any plant below the level of the cast

spells.name: Elite Self Watering Spell
spells.description: Self waters plants up to every hour. The water source must be nearby.

spells.name: Elite Self-Stirring Spell
spells.description: Allows a potion to be stirred automatically at least once every hour

spells.name: Elite Trace Placement
spells.description: Allows one to place a trace in a broad area (no larger than a country) detecting whether or not any spell is cast in the area meeting certain criteria. You may add four criteria (logical components; permissible at the discretion of the headmaster). The logical components may be things like the age of the caster, the spell used, the skill used, the skill level used, background, or similar features. Each criterion cannot be specific to the caster such as their birthdate, name, etc.

spells.name: Embroiden
spells.description: Turns an object into a picture. Only works on non-magical objects (not magical artifacts). Doesn't work on plants, creatures, animals.

spells.name: Engorgement
spells.description: Enlarges an object. Cannot be cast on beings or creatures. The transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Enhanced Trace Placement
spells.description: Allows one to place a trace in a broad area (no larger than a country) detecting whether or not any spell is cast in the area meeting certain criteria. You may add two criteria (logical components; permissible at the discretion of the headmaster). The logical components may be things like the age of the caster, the skill used, the skill level used, background, or similar features. The criterion cannot be specific to the caster such as their birthdate, name, etc.

spells.name: Enhanced Trace Placement
spells.description: Allows one to place a trace in a broad area (no larger than a country) on the use of a word or phrase (usually a name). The trace cannot be placed on a spell incantation.

spells.name: Entomorphis
spells.description: Temporarily transforms the very small target into an insect. The transfiguration will wear off after about 30 seconds.

spells.name: Entrail-Expelling Curse
spells.description: Causes one to experience intense diarrhea resulting in losing 1M wound of vital damage per hour.

spells.name: Epoximise
spells.description: Adheres one object to another as if they had been glued. Wears off after approximately one hour. Headmaster may add penalties for adhering multiple larger objects.

spells.name: Erichtho's Reanimation Ritual
spells.description: An ancient Greek ritual involving pouring the saliva from a rabid dog on a corpse to temporarily animate it. The reanimated corpse is violent in nature, moves at a speed of 7 and bites to cause 1 medium wound per bite (Heavy Wound Cap: 3).

spells.name: Evanesco
spells.description: Vanishes the target. Does not work on beings or beasts while alive. Can cause a heavy wound to a spirit.

spells.name: Everte Statum
spells.description: Throws the victim backward, similarly to if they'd been thrown

spells.name: Evocation
spells.description:
The caster transforms an image into a temporarily animated object, animal, creature or plant (called an animation henceforth). This version of the spell only works on normal sized objects, animals, creatures, plants. The effect lasts for approximately 2 minutes. The animation is non-magical.
If the animation is a plant, it will not work in potions and will have no active effects if ingested or touched. If the animation is an animal or creature, it will only act like a very basic version of the real animal/creature (and can only obey very basic commands).

spells.name: Explosion
spells.description: Causes a medium sized object to explode (such as a piece of furniture) by increasing its internal pressure. Cannot be cast on beings, beasts, or spirits. If a being or beast is damaged by the debris from the explosion, the size of the debris and its proximity should determine the damage that is done. Higher rolls (above 15) produce larger pieces of debris (up to 1 medium wound of blunt force or gouging damage). Lower rolls (closer to 10) produce smaller wounds from splinters and smaller chunks (cut or piercing damage: 2 light wounds).

spells.name: Explosive Containment Charm
spells.description: When successfully cast on a potentially explosive target object, this will contain any explosion (preventing any nearby damage to creatures or property. The explosive item will still explode (thereby being completely expended). The the item explodes at a higher set value than the caster is able to cast, the explosion goes off without mitigation.

spells.name: Expulso
spells.description: Causes a medium-sized or small object to explode by increasing its internal pressure. Cannot be cast on beings, beasts, or spirits. If a being or beast is near the explosion, they take 1 medium wound from the debris.

spells.name: Extension
spells.description: Causes the inside of a container to increase its carrying capacity without expanding on the outside.

spells.name: Extinguishing
spells.description: Puts out a fire. If the fire is especially large, this spell will only extinguish a small section of the fire.

spells.name: False Memory
spells.description: Implants a false memory in the target without them realising it was not originally theirs

spells.name: Feather-Light
spells.description: Causes an object to weigh almost nothing.

spells.name: Fianto
spells.description: Strengthens spells of the shielding subtype by +2. Only works on already-cast shields.
spells.rationale: Whatever the shielding spell guards against has a set value. This spell just increases that set value by 2. It can stack (increase).

spells.name: Fiend Fire Curse
spells.description: Creates an enormous fire that chases and burns all life it can find. Coming into contact with the fire will causes 8 heavy wounds. It is also capable of destroying horcruxes. It is rarely used because of its incredibly common tendency to kill the caster.

spells.name: Fiery Marks
spells.description: Writes in mid-air with fiery marks.

spells.name: Finestra
spells.description: Shatters glass. Glass shards cause 1 light wound to all near the object being broken.

spells.name: Finger-Removal Jinx
spells.description: Removes a finger. Causes 1H wound of vital damage from blood loss and 1H wound of anxiety damage.

spells.name: Finger-Shrinking Jinx
spells.description: Causes the target's fingers to shrink to unusable nubs. This will only last a single turn round in battle or approximately 15 seconds out of battle.
spells.rationale: Consider a longer lasting version of this spell.

spells.name: Fire Making
spells.description: Causes a target object to ignite (must be flammable). Causes one light wound per turn to any creature that is close enough to be burned by the fire. Headmaster may add penalties or other adjustments based on the situation. Will break the Glacius spell

spells.name: Firecrackers
spells.description: Causes firecrackers to shoot out from the tip of one's wand. The color can be determined by the caster. These can be startling and some may notice the sparks. However, this spell is not dangerous.

spells.name: Flagrante Curse
spells.description: Can only be cast on objects (not creatures or plants). Causes the target object to heat up so that it burns the skin of anyone that touches it dealing 1 light wound. Must physically touch the subject's skin.

spells.name: Flame Freezing
spells.description: Conjures a fire that appears to burn normally, but produces no heat.

spells.name: Flashing Paint
spells.description: Causes the target object to flash in a multitude of colors.

spells.name: Flask Conjuring
spells.description: Conjures a flask.

spells.name: Fling Object
spells.description: Causes objects to hurle toward the target. Very small objects take no penalty. Small objects take a penalty of 2. Medium objects take a penalty of 5. Large objects take a penalty of 10. Very large objects take a penalty of 15. Damage depends on the size of the object with very small objects typically causing no damage. Small objects causing 1 light wound. Medium objects causing 2 light wounds. Large objects causing 1 medium wound. Very large objects tend to cause 1 heavy wound.

spells.name: Flintifors
spells.description: Transforms very small objects into matchboxes. This transfiguration will wear off after about 1 day.

spells.name: Flower Conjuring
spells.description: Conjures a bouquet of flowers.

spells.name: Flying Charm
spells.description: Cast on objects to allow them to fly (typically broomsticks). The result of the roll determines the speed and agility of the broom. Flying objects must be registered with the local ministry in most jurisdictions.

spells.name: Four-point spell
spells.description: Causes the caster's own wand to point north

spells.name: Freeing
spells.description: Causes the target to be released from whatever binds it. If the target is bound by a spell, the freeing charm must have a casting result greater than the casting result of its undoing. This works as a counterspell for any spell that intends to bind the target using an outside object (like roots, vines, rope, hair, etc.).

spells.name: Full Body Bind Curse
spells.description: Causes the target person to become completely ridgid and unable to move for one hour. The target can try to break out of this every turn using a straight power roll.
spells.history: This was an invention of Herpo the Foul as he experimented with body bind curses.

spells.name: Fur Growth spell
spells.description: Causes fur to grow on the victim. This transfiguration will last for about four hours.

spells.name: Furnunculus
spells.description: Covers the target in boils (or pimples if the roll is particularly low). If the cast is greater than 12, the target takes 1 light wound per hour until healed.

spells.name: Gash Repair
spells.description: Heals one medium wound of slash/gash damage.

spells.name: Gemino Curse
spells.description: Creates a worthless copy of an object. Cast this on the object in question to create the copy.
spells.history: This is the spell that was artificed onto the goblet in Beletrix Lestrange's vault (Book 7, DH).

spells.name: General effect reversal
spells.description: Terminates all lasting spell effects currently on the target for which the caster's total value is greater than the spell effects total value.

spells.name: General Mending
spells.description: Repairs a broken object

spells.name: Glacius
spells.description: Freezes the target with icy cold air incapacitating them. This will last for two battle turn rounds (or approximately 5 seconds). This does not work in hot environments (like a hot summer day), if the target has been warmed (through the use of the Warming Spell), or if they are near a flame (as in the Bluebell Flame). These mechanisms can also work to revive the frozen target.

spells.name: Gouge Repair
spells.description: Heals 4H wounds of gouge damage.

spells.name: Gouging Curse
spells.description: Gouges deeply into the target dealing 1 medium wound plus 1 per 5 over the Difficulty. Can dig a hole through dirt large enough to fit a human. Through a quirk of magic, the general counter curse does not work on this spell.

spells.name: Granger's Jinx
spells.description: Causes a traitor's skin to break out in boils spelling the word "Sneak" on his or her forehead. If the target is not actually a traitor, the spell has no effect.

spells.name: Greek Binding Ritual
spells.description: This complex ritual, when completed, allows the caster to gain complete control over another person or being for a limited amount of time. Typically, the spell wears off after just one hour. The one who is controlled, may attempt to break free of this bind thrice within the time permitted (using a straight Defense roll).

spells.name: Gripping
spells.description: Makes the target very easy to grip.

spells.name: Grounding Spell
spells.description: Causes any flying objects to begin to lose altitude. Reverses the effects of the hover charm.

spells.name: Hair Loss Curse
spells.description: Removes the target's hair. It will fully regrow within a fairly normal timeframe.

spells.name: Hair-Growing
spells.description: Makes the target's hair grow. This is a permanent transfiguration and no magical reversion will occur. One must simply cut their hair to reduce its length.
spells.rationale: This is set as an alteration spell because of its permanence.

spells.name: Hair-Thickening
spells.description: Thickens the victims hair. This transfiguration will wear off after about 3 days. During this time, styling is completely impossible and there is no known conuterspell to this.

spells.name: Harmonia Nectere Passus
spells.description: Specifically repairs vanishing cabinets

spells.name: Herbifors
spells.description: This spell causes flowers to sprout from the victim's nose. This will wear off after about 6 hours. It is painful, but not damaging.

spells.name: Herbivicus
spells.description: Doubles the size of a plant instantaneously. Only works on sprouts or plants under twelve inches tall. Can only be cast on a plant once in its lifetime.

spells.name: Hex Resistance
spells.description: Protects against hexes. Any Hex cast with an omnibus value under 12 is automatically resisted. Can be cast on an area or as a counterspell. Wears off after one successful resistance.

spells.name: Hidden Markings Charm
spells.description: Places hidden markings or writing on an object.

spells.name: Homenum Revelio
spells.description: Reveals human (but not beast or other being) presence in the vicinity of the caster.

spells.name: Homing Spell
spells.description:
Causes an object, including a transfiguration, to follow a target. The object will hover a few feet from the target's head attempting to keep pace and proximity if the target tries to evade or flee. You must be able to see the target to cast this homing spell, but efforts to conceal one's location after this will not work on the object doing the homing. This spell and associated objects or transfiguration do not cause harm to the attacker. The spells wears off after about 5 minutes.
It can be disabled with a damaging or dispelling cast greater than the value achieved by the homing spell caster.

spells.name: Homonculous Charm
spells.description: Tracks the movements of human beings. The charm has a powerful effect in that it is not fooled by various methods of concealment and disguise. This includes (but is not limited to) invisibility cloaks, polyjuice potions and animagi.
spells.rationale: This was one of the charms placed upon the Marauder's map.

spells.name: Homorphus Charm
spells.description: Forces an animagus to assume its normal shape.

spells.name: Horcrux Making Spell
spells.description: Embeds a part of a wizard's soul into an object, thereby making a horcrux. One must commit murder, thereby forcing the splitting of the soul, in order to embed that part of their soul into the potential horcrux.

spells.name: Horn Tongue Hex
spells.description: Turns the target's tongue into a sharp, bony horn. The target must cast all spells non-verbally.

spells.name: Horton-Keitch Braking Charm
spells.description: Slows a flying object (that is being ridden) at the command of the rider. Does not work on creatures. This is one of the primary charms placed on commercial brooms.

spells.name: Hot Air Burst
spells.description: Creates hot air to burst out of the tip of the caster's wand. Causes 2 light wounds of burn damage stream is directed at a creature (including a human) in close proximity. This will revive someone from Glacius.
spells.rationale: This gives charms casters some options for low level damage dealing and builds on the hot air charm available at lower levels.

spells.name: Hot Air Charm
spells.description: Creates a stream of hot air. Causes 1 light wound due to burns if the stream is successfully directed at a creature (including a human) in close proximity. Will revive a target from Glacius.

spells.name: Hour Reversal Charm
spells.description: Reverses a small amount of time, up to five hours

spells.name: Hover Charm
spells.description: Causes a target to hover in mid air. Works on people.

spells.name: Hurling Hex
spells.description: Causes flying objects (not creatures) to vibrate violently in the air. If this flying object is being ridden, it is likely to buck the rider off.
spells.history: This spell was initially developed to aid alchemists in agitating certain chemicals or materials, but has since been widely applied in a number of disciplines.

spells.name: Illegibilius
spells.description: Makes writing impossible to read

spells.name: Image Transfer
spells.description: Transfers an image to a new location. The new image will be stylized to fit the new context. For example, it may emboss onto leather, embroider into fabric, or become a tattoo on skin.

spells.name: Imobilus
spells.description: Causes an object or non-human creature or animation to be locked in place.

spells.name: Impediment Jinx
spells.description: Stops movement of an object or person moving across the group as if they have hit a wall. The target recovers within about five seconds (or one battle turn round).

spells.name: Imperius Curse
spells.description: Makes the target person or creature obey the caster absolutely. If the target is a person, they can roll resistance checks every round of combat. THe imperius curse grows in strength over time, During the initial stages, the target of the spell can roll resistance checks every minute in order to break free. If they do not break free within the first five minutes, they move into the intermediate stage. During the intermediate stage, the target may roll resistance checks every hour. If they do not break free within the first 24 hours, they move into the final stage. During the final stage, the target may roll resistance checks every hour. If the target resists the curse at any point, they will become aware that they were under the influence of the curse, are hostile toward the caster, and the stages reset.

spells.name: Imperturbable
spells.description: This ward covers a single doorway or object. Nothing can cross the threshold of the ward until it is lifted by the caster or from the inside.

spells.name: Impervius Charm
spells.description: Makes an object repel water and mist

spells.name: Improved Animation Spell
spells.description: Improved Animation Spell. This spell will animate an object giving it five simple commands (at the discretion of the Headmaster). The transfiguration will wear off after 30 minutes.

spells.name: Improved Self-Stirring Spell
spells.description: Allows a potion to be stirred automatically at least daily

spells.name: Improved Trace Placement
spells.description: Allows one to place a trace in a fixed location (no larger than a room or small field) on the use of a word or phrase (usually a name). The trace cannot be placed on a spell incantation.

spells.name: Incarcerous
spells.description: Ties the target with conjured ropes immobilizing them completely. They may still cast wandlessly. There is nothing the target themselves can do to break free once they are bound, though others may be able to free them using spells that would reasonably cut ropes. Arresto Momentum can be used as a counterspell.

spells.name: Inferi Animation Spell
spells.description: Turns a corpse into an inferus

spells.name: Inflatus
spells.description: Inflates the target, filling it with air. If the target fills with enough air, the target may begin to float. Magical-folk and squibs only float for about 15 seconds. Muggles can float for days and need to be professionally deflated.

spells.name: Ingredient Revealing Charm
spells.description: Identifies the ingredients of a potion (must be higher roll than the roll required to make the potion).

spells.name: Instant Scalping Curse
spells.description: Scalps the target removing their hair and flesh from the top of their head. This deals one heavy wound and causes an additional 1 medium wound per minute until the target is able to stop the bleeding.

spells.name: Intermediate animal-beast switching spell
spells.description: Switches an animal and a beast that are one size different. You must be able to see both at the same time. No part of the result may be used in potions. Cannot be cast on beings, but can be cast on a small part of a being. This transfiguration will last approximately 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate animal-plant switching spell
spells.description: Switches an animal and a plant that are one size different. You must be able to see both at the same time. No part of the result may be used in potions. Cannot be cast on beings, but can be cast on a small part of a being. This transfiguration will last approximately 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate beast-plant switching spell
spells.description: Switches a beast and a plant that are one size different. You must be able to see both at the same time. No part of the result may be used in potions. Cannot be cast on beings, but can be cast on a small part of a being. This transfiguration will last approximately 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate Dark Trace Placement
spells.description: Allows one to place a trace in a broad area (no larger than a country) on the use of an evil word (usually a name). The trace cannot be placed on a spell incantation.

spells.name: Intermediate Human to Animal Transfiguration
spells.description: Intermediate Human to Animal Transfiguration

spells.name: Intermediate Human to Object Transfiguration
spells.description: Intermediate Human to Object Transfiguration

spells.name: Intermediate Human to Plant Transfiguration
spells.description: Intermediate Human to Plant Transfiguration

spells.name: Intermediate Interclass Animal to Beast Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any animal into any beast within one size category. This transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate Interclass Animal to Object Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any animal into any object within one size category. This transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate Interclass Animal to Plant Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any animal into any plant within one size category. This transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate Interclass Beast to Animal Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any beast into any animal within one size category. This transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate Interclass Beast to Object Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any beast into any object within one size category. This transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate Interclass Beast to Plant Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any beast into any plant within one size category.

spells.name: Intermediate Interclass Object to Animal Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any object into any animal within one size category. Transfigured animals will attack nearest target for one turn. This transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate Interclass Object to Beast Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any object into any beast within one size category. This transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate Interclass Object to Plant Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any object into any plant within one size category. This transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate Interclass Plant to Animal Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any plant into any animal within one size category. This transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate Interclass Plant to Beast Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any plant into any beast within one size category. This transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate Interclass Plant to Object Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any plant into any object within one size category. This transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate Intraclass Transfiguration
spells.description: You may transfigure the target into any other thing of the same class. It must be within one size category. Does not require switching. This transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate Magical Curse
spells.description: Causes 1M wound of Blunt Force Damage

spells.name: Intermediate Magical Hex
spells.description: Causes 1M wound of Blunt Force Damage

spells.name: Intermediate Magical Jinx
spells.description: Causes 1M wound of Blunt Force Damage

spells.name: Intermediate object-animal switching spell
spells.description: Switches an object and an animal that are one size different. You must be able to see both at the same time. No part of the result may be used in potions. Cannot be cast on beings, but can be cast on a small part of a being. This transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate object-beast switching spell
spells.description: Switches an object and a beast that are one size different. You must be able to see both at the same time. No part of the result may be used in potions. Cannot be cast on beings, but can be cast on a small part of a being. This transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate object-plant switching spell
spells.description: Switches an object and a plant that are one size different. You must be able to see both at the same time. No part of the result may be used in potions. Cannot be cast on beings, but can be cast on a small part of a being. This transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intermediate Plant Accelerant
spells.description: Allows one to speed the growth of a plant by 75% on any plant below the level of the cast

spells.name: Intermediate Plant Decelerant
spells.description: Allows one to slow the growth of a plant by 75% on any plant below the level of the cast

spells.name: Intermediate Self Watering Spell
spells.description: Self waters plants up to every 12 hours. The water source must be nearby.

spells.name: Intermediate Self-Stirring Spell
spells.description: Allows a potion to be stirred automatically at least once every 12 hours

spells.name: Intermediate Trace Placement
spells.description: Allows one to place a trace on a particular person to determine any time they cast a spell of a particular skill. The target will not be made aware of the trace automatically. The caster must decide which skill they are tracing when they cast the spell. They can only detect spells cast below the skill of their own cast.

spells.name: Intesti
spells.description: Stops vomiting and diarrhea include any damage over time associated with those symptoms. Heals 1M wound of disease/toxic/poison damage.

spells.name: Intraclass Intermediate Switching Spell
spells.description: Switches two objects that are of the same class and are only one size category different. You must be able to see both objects at the same time. The resulting objects cannot be used in potions. Cannot be cast on beings, but can be cast on a small part of a being. This transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Intricate Trace Placement
spells.description: Allows one to place a trace in a broad area (no larger than a country) detecting whether or not any spell is cast in the area meeting certain criteria. You may add three criteria (logical components; permissible at the discretion of the headmaster). The logical components may be things like the age of the caster, the skill used, the skill level used, background, or similar features. The criterion cannot be specific to the caster such as their birthdate, name, etc.

spells.name: Intrusion Spell
spells.description: Counters the anti-intrusion jinx if the result of this cast exceeds the result of the anti-intrusion cast.

spells.name: Jelly-Brain Jinx
spells.description: Reduces a targets mental faculties. All spells cast take -5 penalty

spells.name: Jelly-Fingers Jinx
spells.description: Causes the target's fingers to become wobbly, making it difficult to grasp objects. A caster affected by this spell must successfully make an agility roll of 15 prior to casting (but they can do this on the same turn). Lasts about two hours.

spells.name: Jelly-Legs Jinx
spells.description: Makes the target's legs wobble uncontrollably making standing difficult and walking impossible. Lasts one hour (or an entire battle unless healed).

spells.name: Jinx Resistance Spell
spells.description: Protects against jinxes. Any jinx cast with a total value of 12 or less is automatically resisted. Can be cast on an area or as a counterspell. Wears off after one successful resistance.

spells.name: Killing Curse
spells.description: Causes the target to die. The caster must roll a 20 or greater. The spell cannot be blocked by standard shielding spells, however spells which attack the caster in some way can collide with the spell, effectively blocking it. The spell may also be blocked by large objects. If the target is hit, the target takes 7 heavy wounds. This is one of the unforgivable curses.

spells.name: Knee-Reversing Hex
spells.description: Target's kneecaps are reversed so that they are on the back of their legs. Deals 1H wound of Vital Damage. Can only be cast on a victim once (until healed). Skelio Repara will cure these wounds. This is extremely painful.

spells.name: Knockback Jinx
spells.description: Knocks the target back (can be cast on humans and beasts. Unless the target lands on a very soft surface (like a cushion or pillow or water from a low height), the force of the fall will cause at least 2 light wounds of damage. Additional damage depends on how far the target flies and what they hit (headmaster's discretion). Target typically flies about 10 feet.

spells.name: Lacarnum Inflamari
spells.description: Produces a simple magical fire. If one comes too near this fire, they take 1 light wound (burn damage).

spells.name: Langlock
spells.description: Stick's the target's tongue to the roof of their mouth. Causes embarrassment (-1 penalty to all rolls until this wears off; duration at headmaster's discretion). All spells must be cast non-verbally.

spells.name: Lapifors
spells.description: Temporarily tansfigures a small target into a rabbit. The transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Leek Jinx
spells.description: Causes leeks to grow from the target's ears. This will last for about 2 days and will cause embarrassment.

spells.name: Leg Locker Curse
spells.description: Locks a humanoid's legs together, forcing them to hop around to move. This lasts for two battle turn rounds or 10 seconds. During this time, the target can only move about five feet per turn round (or 10 seconds).

spells.name: Levicorpus
spells.description: Hoists people up into the air by their ankles. Causes Embarrassment. General Counter Curse does not work on this effect.

spells.name: Levitation
spells.description: Levitates the target object. The caster must maintain focus.

spells.name: Liberacorpus
spells.description: Counters levicorpus

spells.name: Lignum Appendiciem
spells.description: Reattaches a lost limb. Stops all bleeding, thereby preventing an further damage over time (if the damage was caused by bleeding).

spells.name: Magical Hex
spells.description: Causes 2L wound of Blunt Force Damage

spells.name: Magical Jinx
spells.description: Causes 2L wound of Blunt Force Damage

spells.name: Magical Jinx
spells.description: Causes 2L wound of Blunt Force Damage

spells.name: Magicus Extremos
spells.description: Helps the target with their next spell cast granting a +2 bonus on their next cast.

spells.name: Major Evocation
spells.description:
The caster transforms an image into a temporarily animated object, animal, creature or plant (called an animation henceforth). This version of the spell only works on large sized objects, animals, creatures, plants. The effect lasts for approximately 2 minutes. The animation is non-magical.
If the animation is a plant, it will not work in potions and will have no active effects if ingested or touched. If the animation is an animal or creature, it will only act like a very basic version of the real animal/creature (and can only obey very basic commands).

spells.name: Map Making
spells.description: Creates a map template. This map can be imbued with magical properties once appropriate charms are added to it. This can be used to acquire a map of the area, though the headmaster has discretion to determine a roll appropriate to mapping an area automatically like this.

spells.name: Marksdale's Charm
spells.description: Delays the progression of a disease for 12 hours. No damage over time will be suffered during these 12 hours. Can be cast successively.
spells.history: Created by Marksdale and Idalia Wincenty to slow the progression of the Disease of the Seven that infected Hogwarts.

spells.name: Mayan Psychotropic Smoke Ritual
spells.description: This ritual, involving inhaling psychotropic smoke, allows one to become aware of, and safely interact with all spirits in the vicinity. The effects last only 20 minutes and some spirits will act violently toward the one who entered their spirit realm improperly.

spells.name: Melofors
spells.description: Encases the target's head in a pumpkin. Target cannot see, but is able to breathe effectively. This is considered a transfiguration because the pumpkin is fully encasing the head and cannot be physically removed. This transfiguration will last about 1 minute.

spells.name: Memory Restoration Charm
spells.description: This can be used as a reactive counter-curse for obliviate. It can also be used to restore one's memory if it has been lost due to the obliviate charm (or any other form of memory loss). If the memory loss is related to a disease, the memory will only return for a short time. If the memory loss is related to the obliviate spell, it can only be restored if the value of this cast is greater than the value of the obliviate cast. If the obliviate charm has been in place (as in, no one has successfully removed it) for more than 10 years, the memory is gone forever.

spells.name: Meteolojinx Recanto
spells.description: Meteolojinx Recanto is a counter-curse for any environmental spell. It can be cast as a reaction to any environmental spell cast. It can also either nullify the effects of any environmental effect or can be used to create the exact opposite effect. This spell cast must achieve a higher omnibus value that the competing spell cast.

spells.name: Mimblewimble Hex
spells.description: Ties the target's tongue in a knot preventing coherent speech. All spells must be cast as non-verbal

spells.name: Ministry's Fog
spells.description: Patented charm used by the ministry for magic to conceal certain areas from muggle view

spells.name: Minor Evocation
spells.description:
The caster transforms an image into a temporarily animated object, animal, creature or plant (called an animation henceforth). This version of the spell only works on very small objects, animals, creatures, plants. The effect lasts for approximately 2 minutes. The animation is non-magical.
If the animation is a plant, it will not work in potions and will have no active effects if ingested or touched. If the animation is an animal or creature, it will only act like a very basic version of the real animal/creature (and can only obey very basic commands).

spells.name: Molly Weasley's Curse
spells.description: Freezes a victim in place for three battle turn rounds (about 15 seconds). Any damage spells cast on the target cause an additional heavy wound while under the spells effects.

spells.name: Morsmordre
spells.description: Conjures the dark mark, a sign of death eaters. Causes one medium wound of anxiety damage for anyone who was alive during Voldemort's reign.

spells.name: Mucus ad Nauseam
spells.description: Gives the victim a nasty cold and an extremely runny nose. Victim's take 1M wound per day until the cold is cured. The effect will not wear off. The victim may not notice any effect at first, sometimes meaning they will not know that they have been cast on.

spells.name: Muffling Jinx
spells.description: Prevents others from hearing nearby conversations by filling peoples' ears with an unidentifiable buzzing

spells.name: Muggle-Repelling
spells.description: Prevents muggles from entering the area. When muggles begin to enter the area covered by this spell, they will suddenly experience an unrelenting worry that they've left the stove on (and will return home).

spells.name: Multicorfors
spells.description: Changes the color and style of one's clothing. It can be useful as a disguise to blend into a crowd when being searched for. The transfiguration will last about 5 minutes.

spells.name: Mutatio Skullus
spells.description: Temporarily causes the target to grow extra heads. This transfiguration will last about 30 seconds.

spells.name: Needle Point Curse
spells.description: The target feels as if dozens of tiny needles are pricking their skin. Causes 1M wound of piercing damage from multiple tiny punctures.

spells.name: Obliteration Charm
spells.description: Removes footprints

spells.name: Obliviate
spells.description: Removes or alters the target's memory. If the memory is particularly strong, the result of the roll and bonuses need to be +5.

spells.name: Obscuro
spells.description: Causes a blindfold to appear over the target’s eyes. It will remain magically bound to the target’s eyes for 30 seconds or two battle turn rounds unless removed by magic. The target takes a -10 to any attempts to cast at a specific target during this time. Area spells or spells on onesself are not affected.

spells.name: Oculus Reparo
spells.description: Mends eyeglasses

spells.name: Oppugno Jinx
spells.description: Causes a set of objects to swarm a target. The objects will not damage the target. This may obscure their vision, however. Lasts for about 30 seconds or two battle turn rounds.

spells.name: Orbis
spells.description: Sucks the target into the ground. The target will become partially submerged and immobilized but not incapacitated. They may use an agility roll to break free.

spells.name: Oscausi
spells.description: Seals one's mouth shut making it appear it was never there. This is extremely anxiety provoking (causing one heavy wound of anxiety damage). All spells must be cast non-verbally.

spells.name: Packing/Unpacking
spells.description: Packs items into a container, such as a suitcase.

spells.name: Papyrus Reparo
spells.description: Mends torn pieces of paper

spells.name: Partis Temporus
spells.description: Creates a temporary gap in an object or body of water. Cannot be cast on beings or creatures. Works on Spirits to cause 2 light wounds.

spells.name: Patronus
spells.description:
An immensely complicated and an extremely difficult spell, that evokes a partially-tangible positive energy force known as a Patronus. It is the primary protection against Dementors and Lethifolds, against which there are no other known defence. There are two types of Patronuses: corporeal which means a Patronus with a particular shape and form and incorporeal Patronus. Incorporeal Patronuses can be cast with -5 to the difficulty. They have no particular shape and only shield against dementors. However, some famous wizards, like Remus Lupin, choose to cast incorporeal Patronuses to hide their identity. A corporeal patronus can drive away dementors (7 heavy wounds) and is cast at the normal difficulty level.
Add penalties for long distance sending.

spells.name: Pepper Breath Hex
spells.description: Gives the victim fiery hot breath. The breath can cause small burns on others equivalent to a light wound. This hex lasts for about 3 days and comes with awful smelling breath.

spells.name: Permanent Sticking
spells.description: Permanently affixes one object to another. Cannot be used on beasts, beings or spirits. This can be reversed using Surgito if the Surgito cast value is greater than the Perpetuus Obhaeresco set value.

spells.name: Peskipiksi Pesternomi
spells.description: Makes pixies docile for one turn round or approximately 5 seconds.

spells.name: Pest Repellant
spells.description: Protects plants or fungi from non-magical pests

spells.name: Piertotum Locomotor
spells.description:
Can animate a target object to act in a limited defensive way. Objects can be no larger than a chair and have a heavy wound capacity of 1.
Objects will "fight" with a fairly simple attack consistent with their physical shape (for instance, a chair might have default to a kick attack). The attack typically does no more than 1 medium wound of damage.

spells.name: Piscifors
spells.description: Transforms small objects into an inedible fish. The transfiguration will last for about 30 seconds. This does allow breathing underwater. However, if the transfiguration wears off while underwater, one must get to the surface quickly or risk taking fatal vital damage.

spells.name: Placement Charm
spells.description: Magically fixes an object in place. Cannot be cast on beasts or beings (with the exception of Kelpies)

spells.name: Portus
spells.description: Turns an object into a portkey. Patended by the ministry of magic. Unauthorized use is illegal.

spells.name: Protean
spells.description: Causes any number of cosmetically identical objects in the caster's possession to mirror any changes made to any of the other objects. Such changes include any damage done, extreme warming or cooling, or any writing applied to the surface. The charm will remain in effect for about 30 days before it needs to be reapplied.
spells.history: This was used by Hermoine on fake coins to allow for long-distance communication.

spells.name: Protego Diabolica
spells.description: Places a ring of black fire around the caster that only affects enemies. Causing one medium wound immediately if touched.

spells.name: Protego Horribilis
spells.description: Shield against all dark arts spells that can be cast over an area about the size of a room. If a Dark Arts spell is cast (and it falls below the total value of the Protego Horribilis cast), the caster will instead take a medium wound. If the Dark Arts cast exceeds the Protego Horribilis cast, the shield is broken and will not function any longer.

spells.name: Puncture Repair
spells.description: Heals a puncture wound for 5H wound. Only works once per wound. If there are any splinters or stingers still in the wound itself, this spell will not work. You must first remove the stinger/piercing object.

spells.name: Pus-Squirting Hex
spells.description: Causes Yellowish goo to squirt from one's nose. This is a training spell.

spells.name: Quick-Floor
spells.description: The floor becomes semi-solid and partially absorbs objects or creatures standing on it. An agility check higher than the casting value extracts the creature from the floor.

spells.name: Quiet Charm
spells.description: Makes a target sound quieter

spells.name: Raining Ceiling Jinx
spells.description: Causes a storm cloud to gather below the ceiling of a room. Shortly after it begins to rain or snow according to the caster's wishes.

spells.name: Reductor
spells.description: Causes the target or part of the target to be reduced to ash. Cannot be cast on Beings or Beasts unless they are dead. Will temporarily disperse a spirit, causing a medium wound. Spirits take (lose) one turn to reassemble themselves.

spells.name: Refilling Charm
spells.description: Refills a drink cup. More of the liquid in question must be available nearby and the caster must know about the source of the liquid.

spells.name: Refined Trace Placement
spells.description: Allows one to place a trace in a general location (no larger than a few dozen acres) on the use of a word or phrase (usually a name). The trace cannot be placed on a spell incantation.

spells.name: Relashio
spells.description: Forces the target to release its grip on whatever it is holding

spells.name: Rennervation
spells.description: Wakes an unconscious being (including if stupefied). No need to overcome the strength of the previously cast spell.

spells.name: Reparifors
spells.description: Counteracts minor poisoning (if causing less than or equal to 2 light wounds per duration). If used to stop poisoning, the caster must roll higher than the value associated with the poison. However, doing so prevents any further damage over time (but does not heal the existing damage done. This spell will not work on other kinds of disease or toxic damage.

spells.name: Repello Inimucum
spells.description: Creates an invisible barrier that is set in place. Anyone passing through this barrier takes a heavy wound. If this wound is enough to kill the target, they will disintegrate.

spells.name: Revealing Charm
spells.description: Reveals hidden markings on an object

spells.name: Revelio
spells.description: Reveals the properties of a magical artifact.

spells.name: Reverse Transfiguration
spells.description: Reverses the effects of generic transfiguration or alteration transfiguration spells. Can be cast silently without penalty. The cast value must be greater than the set value.

spells.name: Reverte
spells.description: Returns objects to their original positions or states. Removes any changes due to alteration spells.

spells.name: Revival
spells.description: This is a remedy spell for any spells whose primary action is incapacitation. This includes petrificus totalus and dremmen. It will not work on Statuesque or Stupefy.
spells.history: This was invented as a response to Herpo the Foul's Sea People's raids and was a major part of turning the tide of the war and ending his reign.

spells.name: Rictumsempra
spells.description: Causes the target to feel tickled and therefore incapacitated with laughter. The target will be incapacitated for one battle turn round or 15 seconds of non-battle time. However, critical successes lead to a paradoxical unrelenting laughter which is incapacitating indefinitely (and must be healed usually in a hospital setting).

spells.name: Riddikulus
spells.description: Only works on boggarts. This will transform the boggart into a funny version of itself. This is the only spell that works on boggarts.

spells.name: Rose Growth
spells.description: Causes rosebushes to grow at an unusually fast pace

spells.name: Rowboat Spell
spells.description: Causes a rowboat to row itself in the direction of the caster's wishes. It will do so for approximately 3 days. When multiple rowboats are left to their own devices, they tend to try to travel in packs together. If alone, they tend to go on short adventures or excursions and can often be found many leagues away on beaches presumably sunning themselves.

spells.name: Sardine Hex
spells.description: Makes the victim sneeze out sardines

spells.name: Scorching spell
spells.description: Produces dancing flames that last for about three battle turn rounds or 45 seconds. These flames cause 1 medium wound of burn damage to anyone in close proximity. This will revive anyone in the immediate area of Glacius.

spells.name: Scouring
spells.description: Cleans the target as if with a stiff scrub brush. Most useful for very dirty surfaces. The spell can take a while to successfully clean the target if it is particularly dirty. Not suitable for soft or easily scratched surfaces.

spells.name: Scrivener
spells.description: Causes a quill to automatically copy the contents of a target book, letter or similar as long as it is provided with the necessary ink and paper. Will also copy pictures and runes.

spells.name: Sealing Charm
spells.description: Magically seals envelopes. Must be magically unsealed to be opened.

spells.name: Sectumsempra
spells.description: Creates many deep and heavy gashes in the target's torso. Causes 3 heavy wounds.

spells.name: Severing Charm
spells.description: Used to precisely to cut or tear object. If cast on a person, it causes 1 light wound. Diffindo Duri or Maxima causes two light wounds.

spells.name: Shooting Spell
spells.description: Conjures a magical beam that shoots at a target. Causes 2L wound of burn damage.

spells.name: Shrinking
spells.description: Shrinks an object. Cannot be cast on beings, beasts or spirits. This will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Silencing Curse
spells.description: Silences the target creature or person. Any spells cast by the target must be cast as non-verbal. This lasts for three battle turn rounds or about 45 seconds of out-of-battle time.

spells.name: Silver Shield Spell
spells.description: The caster conjures a shield around themselves defending against all incoming spells and projectiles. They must be hugging or physically shielding another to protect them additionally.

spells.name: Simple animal-beast switching spell
spells.description: Switches an animal and a beast that are the same size. You must be able to see both at the same time. No part of the result may be used in potions. Cannot be cast on beings, but can be cast on a small part of a being. The switch will last for about 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple animal-plant switching spell
spells.description: Switches an animal and a plant that are the same size. You must be able to see both at the same time. No part of the result may be used in potions. Cannot be cast on beings, but can be cast on a small part of a being. This transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple Animation Spell
spells.description: Simple Animation Spell. This spell will animate an object giving it a single simple command (at the discretion of the Headmaster). The transfiguration will wear off after one minute.

spells.name: Simple beast-plant switching spell
spells.description: Switches a beast and a plant that are the same size. You must be able to see both at the same time. No part of the result may be used in potions. Cannot be cast on beings, but can be cast on a small part of a being. The switch will last for about 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple Dark Trace Placement
spells.description: Allows one to place a trace in a fixed location (no larger than a room or small field) on the use of an evil word (usually a name). The trace cannot be placed on a spell incantation.

spells.name: Simple Interclass Animal to Beast Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any animal into any beast of the same size category. This transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple Interclass Animal to Object Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any animal into any object of the same size category. This transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple Interclass Animal to Plant Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any animal into any plant of the same size category. This transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple Interclass Beast to Animal Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any beast into any animal of the same size category. This transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple Interclass Beast to Object Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any beast into any object of the same size category. This transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple Interclass Beast to Plant Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any beast into any plant of the same size category. This transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple Interclass Object to Animal Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any object into any animal of the same size category. This transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple Interclass Object to Beast Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any object into any beast of the same size category. This transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple Interclass Object to Plant Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any object into any plant of the same size category. This transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple Interclass Plant to Animal Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any plant into any animal of the same size category. This transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple Interclass Plant to Beast Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any plant into any beast of the same size category. This transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple Interclass Plant to Object Transfiguration
spells.description: Generic transfiguration allowing you to transfigure any plant into any object of the same size category. This transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple Intraclass Switching Spell
spells.description: Switches two objects that are of the same class and size. You must be able to see both objects at the same time. No part of the result may be used in potions. Cannot be cast on beings, but can be cast on a small part of a being. The transfiguration will last approximately one minute (or four battle turn rounds).

spells.name: Simple Intraclass Transfiguration
spells.description: You may transfigure the target into any other thing of the same class and size. Does not require switching. This transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple Mending Charm
spells.description: Stops the bleeding of minor cuts, fixes broken noses, and pops in dislocated joints. If one took damage as a result of any of these issues, this spell also heals two light wounds in the process.

spells.name: Simple object-animal switching spell
spells.description: Switches an object and an animal that are the same size. You must be able to see both at the same time. No part of the result may be used in potions. Cannot be cast on beings, but can be cast on a small part of a being. The switch will last for about 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple object-beast switching spell
spells.description: Switches an object and a beast that are the same size. You must be able to see both at the same time. No part of the result may be used in potions. Cannot be cast on beings, but can be cast on a small part of a being. The switch will last for about 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple object-plant switching spell
spells.description: Switches an object and a plant that are the same size. You must be able to see both at the same time. No part of the result may be used in potions. Cannot be cast on beings, but can be cast on a small part of a being. The switch will last for about 1 minute. This transfiguration will last approximately 1 minute.

spells.name: Simple Plant Accelerant
spells.description: Allows one to speed the growth of a plant by 25% on any plant below the level of the cast

spells.name: Simple Plant Decelerant
spells.description: Allows one to slow the growth of a plant by 25% on any plant below the level of the cast

spells.name: Simple Self Watering Spell
spells.description: Self waters plants up to every month. The water source must be nearby.

spells.name: Simple Self-Stirring Spell
spells.description: Allows a potion to be stirred automatically at least monthly

spells.name: Simple Trace Placement
spells.description: Allows one to place a basic trace on a fixed location (no larger than a room or small field) to determine if a spell of a particular type is cast in that location. The caster must decide which skill they are tracing when they cast the spell. They can only detect spells cast below the skill of their own cast.

spells.name: Skelio Repara
spells.description: Returns the basic skeletal structure back to its original position. This is an alternative way to heal broken bones but can also manage dislocations. Also heals 5H wounds of crushing/blunt force damage.

spells.name: Skitter
spells.description: +2 Bonus to Agility for one minute

spells.name: Skurge Charm
spells.description: Cleans up ectoplasm (the caster can keep the sample if they choose). It can also frighten ghosts and other spirits. Causes one heavy wound to Spirits.

spells.name: Slicking
spells.description: Makes the floor (or ground) in a particular small area become slippery. anyone trying to walk across that patch of floor must make successfully make a finesse roll of greater than 7 or they fall down. They can get up and try again next turn. Does not affect casting. All other finesse rolls are -5.

spells.name: Slippery spell
spells.description: Makes an object slippery and difficult to hold. Wears off after appxomiately one hour of time.

spells.name: Slowing Charm
spells.description:
Decreases the velocity of a moving target. Can be used as a counter-spell for projectiles (like arrows or bullets or crystal balls that have been thrown).
Will not slow magical beams or spells.

spells.name: Slug Vomit Hex
spells.description: Causes the target to vomit slugs every few seconds. This lasts one hour and there is no known cure.

spells.name: Smashing Spell
spells.description: Creates a minor explosion (cannot be cast on people or creatures). Anyone near the target takes a Two light wounds of cutting damage from the resultant debris. Counterspells cannot be used against this.

spells.name: Smokescreen spell
spells.description: This fills an area with smoke that hinders everyone's visibility. Casting on a target more than touching distance away takes a -5 penalty. All perception checks take a -10 penalty.

spells.name: Snake-Conjuring
spells.description: Conjures a snake. Lasts one combat turn and attacks the nearest target unless a parsletongue redirects it.

spells.name: Softening
spells.description: Makes the target object temporarily soft and spongy. Can be cast as a counter-action to non-magical projectiles being thrown at a target.

spells.name: Sonorous Charm
spells.description: Causes a magnified roar from the tip of the wand. Disorients all in the area. The caster of this spell can then cast once without the target being able to attempt any counter-curses or dodging.

spells.name: Sparks
spells.description: Throws a jet of sparks into the air which can be used to alert others. The caster can determine the color. The sparks fade within a matter of seconds.

spells.name: Spell of Deception
spells.description: Causes the recepient to believe a lie that was told to them.

spells.name: Spell Replay
spells.description: Causes a target to create a ghost image of the last spell that it cast

spells.name: Spider Repelling Spell
spells.description: Drives away spiders, includingÂ Acromantulas. Note that this does not wound the spiders in any way.

spells.name: Spirit Conjuring
spells.description: The caster casts a spirit which immediately takes its turn. It has 1H wound capacity and can be dispatched with the wand lighting charm. It causes 1L wound of anxiety-related damage.

spells.name: Spiritual Release
spells.description:
This spell forcibly releases a spirit from the place to which they are presently bound. The spirit may attempt to resist this cast, but must roll a 10 on the die to do so. Failure to roll a ten forces the spirit from this plane of existence against their will. This is akin to killing a spirit outright. This spell is against magical law in most countries.
The caster takes one heavy wound per cast. The caster will shed a single blood tear for every cast.

spells.name: Sponge knees curse
spells.description: Makes the target's legs spongy, making it difficult for them to walk. They need to roll a finesse of 5 to move until the spell wears off (two rounds of battle or 30 seconds).

spells.name: Stair Slicking
spells.description: Causes a stairway to flatten into a slide. Anyone stepping on the stairs will slide to the bottom. If they slide all the way down the stairs, they will take 1 medium wound of blunt force damage. The transfiguration lasts for about 1 minute (or four battle turn rounds).

spells.name: Statuesque
spells.description: Turns a target into a statue for a day. If engaged in battle, this participant will no longer fight for the remainder of this battle. There is nothing that will revive the individual except waiting.

spells.name: Stealth Sensing Spell
spells.description: Detects those under magical disguise or concealment. This can detect the Imperius curse so long as the caster's cast value is higher than the imperius curse's set value.

spells.name: Steleus
spells.description: A hex that causes the victim to sneeze for a period of time. This is a training spell. It can disorient for a short period of time. One turn in battle. All casts take a -3 penalty.

spells.name: Stickfast
spells.description: Sticks the target's shoes to the ground. The target, of course, can remove their shoes and walk around just fineâ€¦ but they will take a -2 penalty to all finesse checks. The spell is ineffective on bare feet and socks.

spells.name: Sticking
spells.description: Sticks one object to another object or surface. The sticking will last for about three days before wearing off.

spells.name: Stinger Removal
spells.description: Removes an embedded stinger or other small embedded piercing object (splinter) from one's skin and heals one light wound of damage (puncture type only). This is a slightly tricky spell since stingers and splinters are so tiny. Critical fails cause 1 light wound. Generally, piercing damage cannot be healed if a stinger is still embedded in the target.

spells.name: Stinging Jinx
spells.description: Magically and profusely stings the flesh of a target. It can render the target unrecognizable . Causes a medium wound.

spells.name: Stoneform
spells.description: Causes the target to turn to stone.

spells.name: Stretching Jinx
spells.description: Causes the target to become very stretched out and unstable. The target takes -2 to all finesse checks until they are cured of the affliction.

spells.name: Stunning Spell
spells.description: Knocks the target unconscious. By default, the unconsciousness lasts for approximately 3 hours and there is nothing that will revive someone from this spell except waiting the full three hours.

spells.name: Summoning Charm
spells.description: Pulls a nearby object through the air to the caster. Penalties should be applied for heavier objects or objects that are farther away. If the object is being held, the holder can roll a strength check to try to hold onto the item. No line of site needed.

spells.name: Supersensory
spells.description: Enhances the caster's senses, including their ability to see out of their periphery. Perception checks +2 for about 30 seconds.

spells.name: Supreme Evocation
spells.description:
The caster transforms an image into a temporarily animated object, animal, creature or plant (called an animation henceforth). This version of the spell only works on very large sized objects, animals, creatures, plants. The effect lasts for approximately 2 minutes. The animation is non-magical.
If the animation is a plant, it will not work in potions and will have no active effects if ingested or touched. If the animation is an animal or creature, it will only act like a very basic version of the real animal/creature (and can only obey very basic commands).

spells.name: Surgito
spells.description: Can be used to remove enchantments.

spells.name: Taboo
spells.description: Charm that can be placed on a word, name, or spell. If the tabood word/spell is said/cast, the original caster of the taboo spell will be alerted to the location of the speaker/caster. The caster takes two heavy wounds when casting this spell

spells.name: Tail-growing hex
spells.description: Causes the target to grow a tail. This is permanent unless magically or surgically removed.

spells.name: Teeth straightening spell
spells.description: Straightens crooked teeth. If one is experiencing damage or pain from having their teeth being crooked, it is now cured.

spells.name: Teleportation
spells.description: Vanishes objects which then appear elsewhere. The target location must be a nearby place that the caster knows well.

spells.name: Tent Assembly
spells.description: Used to erect a tent or other upright structure.

spells.name: Tentaclifors
spells.description: Transfigures the target's head into a tentacle

spells.name: Titillando
spells.description: Temporarily tickles and disorients the victim. The target takes a -2 penalty to all spell casts for one round of battle.

spells.name: Toenail Growing Hex
spells.description: Causes toenails to grow at an extreme and uncontrollabl rate. Causes embarrassment at low rolls. Also causes incapacitation at higher rolls.

spells.name: Tooth-Growing Jinx
spells.description: Causes the target's front teeth to grow several centimeters causes -2 penalty on all casts. This lasts for two battle turn rounds or 30 seconds.

spells.name: Tracking Spell
spells.description: Reveals traces of magic, including footprints and track marks

spells.name: Transmogrifian Torture
spells.description: Tortures the victim. Causes 1 medium wound of sanity damage per cast. Temporarily incapacitates the victim (1 turn round in battle).

spells.name: Tripping Jinx
spells.description: Causes the target to fall over if they are currently walking or running. With a critical hit, the target will usually drop whatever they are holding). Works on creatures, humanoids, and animated objects that appear to be "walking". Will not work on spirits.

spells.name: Twitchy-ears hex
spells.description: Causes the victim's ears to twitch. The target takes a -2 to all perception rolls for 1 minute or 4 battle turn rounds.

spells.name: Unbreakable vow
spells.description: Causes a vow taken by a witch or wizard to be inviolable. If they break it, they die.

spells.name: Unbreaking
spells.description: Makes the target object unbreakable. In order for an incoming spell to break the object, it must first break the charm by exceeding the value on this ward. Only then will subsequent casts be capable of breaking the object.

spells.name: Unchoking Spell
spells.description: Clears the airway of a choking person. If they have taken any damage as a result of their difficulty breathing, their wounds are immediately healed as soon as they can breathe again.

spells.name: Unlocking
spells.description: Unlocks a lock

spells.name: Unplottable Ward
spells.description: Makes an area unmappable.

spells.name: Unsealing Charm
spells.description: Magically unseals a magically sealed envelope.

spells.name: Unsticking Spell
spells.description: Unsticks two objects that have been magically stuck together (complete reversal of the permanent sticking spell).

spells.name: Unsupported flight
spells.description: Allows a witch or wizard to fly through the air unaided. Self-cast only

spells.name: Up
spells.description: Lifts an object off the ground and into the caster's hand. Can be cast wandlessly without penalty. Can't be used on beasts, beings, or plants.
